meaning: n.鱿鱼,钓乌贼的钓钩,反潜艇发射装置
examples: Forward credits could be useful in the squid business.
Although the squid is delicious, it doesn't agree with everyone.
I walked into the cockpit and there was a squid there looking up at me!
Giant squids are infamously bad listeners, and the whale just wants to kill the squid!
Frequent visitors include a trumpet fish known as Nick, as well as squid and octopus at night.
